title: Swarm Task Envelope
description: Envelope issued by the Orchestrator to the Builder. The Builder must refuse to act on a missing or out-of-policy envelope. See docs/agent-team/swarm_roles.md and swarm_task_routing.md.

id.description: Stable identifier for this envelope (UUID, ULID, or repo-local hash).

userRequest.description: Verbatim or paraphrased user request that triggered this envelope.

autonomyTier.description: 0 = blocked, 1 = read-only, 2 = draft/spec, 3 = execute with review, 4 = autonomous with strict limits.

requiredValidation.description: Validations the Builder must run and the Reviewer must verify before 'pass'.

approvalRequired.description: True if a Reviewer verdict is required before finalization.

humanApprovalRequired.description: True if a human owner must sign off (Tier 0 or production-sensitive slices).

risks.description: Named risks the Orchestrator has identified. The Builder must surface new risks, not silently absorb them.

expectedOutputs.description: Concrete artifacts the Builder is expected to produce (file paths, doc sections, schema files, etc.).

deadline.description: Optional ISO-8601 deadline. The Orchestrator may set this for time-boxed slices; it is never a hard SLA for the swarm itself.
